positive: A majestic, stylized mountain range silhouette at sunset, viewed from a crystal-clear meadow. The scene features dramatic, crisp peaks overlapping a calm, reflective body of water. The sky gradient transitions from deep indigo and sapphire blue at the zenith to vibrant coral and tangerine orange near the horizon. The composition is centered, utilizing strong negative space in the sky and a clean, contrasting foreground silhouette of the mountains and grass. Artistic style is modern graphic illustration, high-contrast, vector-like quality, with visible halftones for texture. Minimalist, aesthetically pleasing for apparel print, ultra-detailed.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noisy, low detail, photorealistic, complex characters, speech bubble
